        internationalization and localization]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Understand
        the staff and skills needed]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Recognize
        the often forgotten internationalization and locale testing
        responsibilities]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>

::: {#Definitions .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr1 style="height:3.175cm;width:21.59cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:6.349cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Definitions]{.text-T11}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page9 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Definitions]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

1.  [ ]{.text-T8}[Internationalization (I18n)]{.text-T12}

    [  ]{.text-T8}[The process of developing software that supports
    different languages, character sets or sets of cultural dependencies
    without modifying the software.]{.text-T8}

    []{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Definitions .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Definitions]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

1.  [             ]{.text-T13}[Localization (L10n)]{.text-T12}

    [  ]{.text-T8}[The process of adapting software to support a
    specific language, character set and cultural dependencies. This
    process may include translating the user interface and some
    technical communication.]{.text-T8}

    []{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Modifications_to_Existing_Processes .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Modifications to Existing Processes

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}There are
    two alternatives to deal with internationalization and localization
    processes[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Make
        internationalization and localization processes an exception to
        existing processes[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Integrate
        internationalization and localization processes into normal
        procedures[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Modifications_to_Existing_Processes .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Modifications to Existing Processes

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Recommendation]{.text-T17}

-   []{.text-T17}

1.  Make internationalization and localization processes part of normal
    procedures

-    

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

1.   

    This means that Internationalization and Localization activities
    must complete all process steps as normal features. This includes
    (but is not limited to):

     

-   -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0cm;"}[Marketing
        Requirement Document]{.text-T18}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0cm;"}[Feature
        Requirement Document]{.text-T18}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0cm;"}[Design
        Documents]{.text-T18}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0cm;"}[Unit and
        Integration Test Plans]{.text-T18}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0cm;"}[Test
        Reports]{.text-T18}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0cm;"}[Others?]{.text-T18}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page16 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Modifications to Existing Processes

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}All features
    need to be internationalized and tested[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}All
    internationalization and localization activities need to comply with
    standard development processes[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P31 .graphic-pr8 style="height:11.628cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Development
    of software features that support a set of languages and
    cultures[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Remember --
    [ALL]{.text-T19} features must be
    internationalized!!\![]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Staff]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-    

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}All
    Development Staff must understand and be able to write
    internationalized code[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}

::: {#Staff_Skills .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}

1.  [Staff Skills]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Development
    staff that understands:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Character
        sets[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Character
        encodings[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Internationalization
        capabilities of programming and scripting
        languages[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Staff should
    be willing to share internationalization knowledge\
    []{style="margin-left:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}

::: {#page22 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Description]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Unit test
    cases must be executed to verify capabilities for the new locale
    such as:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Ability
        to enter characters[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Ability
        to display characters[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Support
        of different hardware/operating systems[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Description .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Description

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Support
        of different character datatypes (i.e., Multi-byte or
        Wide-characters)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Support
        for information formatting  (i.e., date/time displays or writing
        direction)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Unit Tests
    should also verify some amount of product functionality using the
    new locale[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page24 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Staff]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-    

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The
    development staff implementing the internationalization features are
    responsible for these Unit Tests[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

:::
:::

::: {#page25 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Staff Skills]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The Unit
    Testers will need to know:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Functionality
        of feature being internationalized[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Internationalization
        issues[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Feature
        functionality modified by internationalization[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Existing
        Unit Tests and approaches[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Staff_Skills .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Staff Skills

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   []{.text-T20}

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}It helps to
    like to break things []{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}But it is
    rare for a developer to like to break their own code\![]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}

:::

::: {#Bugs .page-dp3}

1.  Bugs

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr9 style="height:11.642cm;width:22.86cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.693cm; top:5.08cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Bugs found
    during the Internationalization Unit Test interval
    prompt:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}A
        defect report to be written[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}The
        feature to be returned to the internationalization developer for
        modification before further testing[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Some
        Internationalization Unit Tests to be performed
        again[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>

::: {#page29 .page-dp3}

1.  [Description]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Integration
    testing may consist of:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Integration
        Load Acceptance Testing[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Testing
        of new functionality delivered to an integration
        load[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Regression
        testing of functionality delivered in earlier integration
        loads[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page30 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Description

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-    

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Integration
    test cases have some of the same goals of Unit Test Cases but they
    test a collection of deliveries from multiple
    developers[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Even_More_Description .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Even More Description

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Integration
    test cases verify the following support for new
    locales:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Ability
        to enter characters[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Ability
        to display characters[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Support
        of different hardware/operating systems[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Final_Description .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Final Description

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Support
        of different character datatype (i.e., Multi-byte or
        Wide-characters)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Support
        for information formatting  (i.e., date/time displays or writing
        direction)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Integration
    Tests should also verify some amount of product functionality using
    the new locale[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}

::: {#page33 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Staff]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Integration
    Testers will be in a Quality Assurance organization separate from
    the developers[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Share the
    desire of all testers to creatively break the product (and to get
    satisfaction from doing it!!!)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Staff .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Staff

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Many
    organizations perform the initial internationalization project with
    a separate Internationalization Integration Testing
    group[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}This
    separate group should be merged with the normal Integration Testing
    Group[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page35 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Staff Skills]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Integration
    Testers must understand:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Character
        sets[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Character
        encodings[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Locale-specific
        formatting information for new locale[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page36 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Staff Skills

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Biggest
    obstacle to finding good Internationalization Integration Testers
    is:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [Reluctance of the tester ]{.text-T20}

    [to deal with a foreign language!]{.text-T20}

    []{.text-T20}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Even_More_Staff_Skills .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Even More Staff Skills

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Tester does
    not have to be fluent in foreign language[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Does need to
    understand:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Foreign
        character set[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}How to
        enter foreign characters[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Tester also
    needs a [good attitude]{.text-T17}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T17}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Final_Staff_Skills .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Final Staff Skills

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Integration
    Tester needs to understand original language tests[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Can use
    these tests to quickly develop internationalization
    tests[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

:::
:::

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}A

-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Internationalization
        Unit Tests to be performed again[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Some/All
        Internationalization Integration Tests to be performed

::: {#I18n_Regression_Tests .page-dp3}

1.  I18n Regression Tests

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

:::
:::

::: {#page42 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Description]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}This step is
    a [full regression test]{.text-T19} of the internationalized product
    supporting the original language[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Most people
    don't believe this step is necessary[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page43 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Description

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.437cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.692cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The original
    language has already been tested -- Why test it again?[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Because --
    who knows what was broken during the internationalization
    development\![]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page44 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Even More Description

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}You don't
    want to support new markets while breaking the product for the
    original market\![]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[All]{.text-T19}
    product tests should be executed during this regression testing for
    the initial internationalization of the product[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page45 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Staff]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}This testing
    can be performed either by:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Internationalization
        integration testers[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Original
        language product testers[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.   

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page46 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Staff Skills]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-    

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Regression
    Testing staff that understands:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Product
        test cases and procedures for the original
        language[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page47 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Bugs

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.648cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.27cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Bugs found
    during the Original Language Regression Test interval
    prompt:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}A
        defect report to be written[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}The
        feature to be returned to the internationalization developer for
        modification[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page48 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Bugs]{.text-T21}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   -    

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}I18n
        Unit Tests to be performed again[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Some/All
        Internationalization Integration Tests and Original Language
        Regression Tests to be performed again[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Developing_Localization_Features .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Developing Localization Features

</div>
:::

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page50 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Description]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Localization
    development includes:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Translation
        of a glossary of terms[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Translation
        of user interfaces[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Translation
        of documentation[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Translation
        of online Help[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page51 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Description

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr9 style="height:11.642cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.08cm; "}
<div>

-    

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}But
    Localization is more than just translation[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page52 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Description

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}It also
    includes:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Modification
        of information to conform to local culture (i.e., date/time
        formatting, monetary unit, \...)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Modification
        of the product to meet the different local practices (business
        transactions, customer relationships, \...)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page53 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Even More Description

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-    

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}No matter
    how well the product is internationalized, it will [NOT]{.text-T19}
    be successful without proper localization[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page54 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Staff]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Many times,
    the Localization Staff will be external to your organization
    because:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}You do
        not have translators on your staff[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Nor
        would you keep translators busy all of the time[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page55 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Staff Skills]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Localization
    staff should have the following skills:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Native
        speaker in target language[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Experienced
        in specific market of product[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Translation
        experience[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Software
        background\
        []{style="margin-left:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Localization_Unit_Tests .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Localization Unit Tests

</div>
:::

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page57 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Description]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr9 style="height:11.642cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:4.868cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Localization
    Testing involves several different types of testing:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Ability
        to integrate localization information into the
        product[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Appropriateness
        and correctness of the localization modifications[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Product
        functionality after localization[ ]{.text-T22}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T22}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page58 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Staff]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}These
    activities will be performed by:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Translators
        performing the localization[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Localization
        Engineers performing product build and Localization Unit
        Testing[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}This staff
    will likely be from an external Localization company[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page59 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Staff Skills]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Localization
    Unit Testers need foreign language capabilities[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}They also
    need knowledge and training on:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}The
        software product[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Other
        Unit Test cases[ ]{.text-T23}[\
        ]{.text-T23}[]{.text-T23}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page60 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Bugs

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}There are
    two types of bugs that might be found during Localization Unit
    Testing:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Localization
        bugs[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Internationalization
        bugs[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Localization_Bugs .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Localization Bugs

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:23.072cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.328cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Localization
    bugs found during the Localization Unit Test interval
    prompt:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}A
        defect report to be written[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}The
        feature to be returned to the localization developer for
        modification before further testing[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Some
        Localization Unit Tests to be performed again[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Internationalization_Bugs .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Internationalization Bugs

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Internationalization
    Bugs found during the Localization Integration Test interval
    prompt:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}A
        defect report to be written[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}The
        feature to be returned to the internationalization developer for
        modification[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}A lot
        of tests to be performed again\![]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Localization_Integration_Tests .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Localization Integration Tests

</div>
:::

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page64 .page-dp3}

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}This phase
    verifies that:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"} [ALL]{.text-T19}
        product functionality is correct for a localized
        product[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Localization
        is correct and appropriate for the target market[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Localization
    Integration tester must have the following skills:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Knowledge
        of target language[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Extensive
        knowledge of the product[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Extensive
        knowledge of the Localization Integration Test
        cases[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>

::: {#Decision_Time .page-dp3}

1.  Decision Time

<div>

-    

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}How would
    you perform the Localization Integration Testing?[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Answers_?_ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Answers(?)

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:23.072cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.328cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Use the U.S.
    English Tester in the following environment:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}U.S.
        English system next to Japanese system[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Perform
        concurrent Integration Tests on both systems[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}If the
        systems do not match, defect report is written against Japanese
        system[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Answers_?_ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Answers(?)

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}U.S. English
    Testers learned to use Japanese dictionary[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Pre-Sales
    Support staff in Japanese received integration loads to review
    Japanese translations[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Even_More_Answers .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Even More Answers

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Rapid defect
    report response processes were set up to support early installations
    in Japan[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}No major
    localization problems were identified[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Results were
    mainly because of [LUCK]{.text-T19}, not skills[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {#Installation_Testing .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Installation Testing]{.text-T27}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Consider
    that the installation of your product may need to be
    internationalized and/or localized]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Question:
    Does the system administrator know the original language used for
    installation?]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Installation_Testing .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Installation Testing]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[For the
    Hospital Information System, it was assumed that all System
    Administrators knew U.S. English]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Installation
    was not internationalized or localized]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Even_More_Installation_Testing .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Even More Installation Testing]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   []{.text-T8}

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[If
    installation does need to support local languages, add that task to
    the list of internationalization and localization
    activities]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>

:::

1.  [Defect Reporting and Fixing]{.text-T27}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[If you are
    taking the product international, ]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [Does your defect tracking system ]{.text-T28}

    [support other languages?]{.text-T28}

-   []{.text-T28}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Defect_Reporting_and_Fixing .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Defect Reporting and Fixing]{.text-T27}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Even if the
    defect description is written in the local development language,
    foreign text may be needed to fully document the
    problem]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Check the
    international text capabilities of your defect tracking
    system]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Even_More_Defect_Reporting_and_Fixing .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Even More Defect Reporting and Fixing]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   []{.text-T8}

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[A
    description that reads "]{.text-T8}[\^&\*())\*\$]{.text-T29}[" does
    not tell you much]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Tracking_Defects .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Tracking Defects]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Ensure your
    defect system tracks separate products:]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[A
        single, internationalized base product]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[A
        Localization Product for each international market (including
        the original market)]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Note_on_Defects .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Note on Defects]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   []{.text-T8}

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Implement a
    process to translate descriptions of problems in a foreign language
    into the language of the developers!]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Test_Equipment .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Test Equipment]{.text-T27}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[To perform
    internationalization and localization testing, you will need
    equipment for the foreign market:]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Computer
        system]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Operating
        system with foreign locale installed]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Keyboards]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   1.  []{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}

:::

1.  [More Test Equipment]{.text-T8}

<div>

-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Printers]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Printer
        paper (if different size)]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Other
        peripherals/equipment]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd}

1.  [Final Test Equipment]{.text-T8}

:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Determine
    the necessary equipment early in the internationalization and
    localization process]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Equipment
    may need to be purchased in foreign market and shipped to
    development site]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Documentation]{.text-T27}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Not all
    hard-copy documentation may need to be
    localized]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Determine
    foreign user needs and balance against costs of
    translation]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}

:::

::: {#Documentation_L10n_Testing .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Documentation L10n Testing]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Localization
    organization should provide proof-reader (not the translator) to
    verify correctness of translation]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Designate
    development company representative (sales, sales support) in target
    foreign market to proof-read localized
    documentation]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [On-Line Help]{.text-T27}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Usually,
    all on-line Help documentation must be
    localized]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Localization
    organization will provide independent proof-reader to verify
    correctness of documentation]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd}

<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Again,
    designate a person in the foreign market to verify on-line Help
    document]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd}

1.  [Automated Testing]{.text-T27}

<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[You may
    already use test tools to automate the testing of the product in the
    original language]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Investigate
    if the test tools support foreign character
    sets!]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>

::: {#More_Automated_Testing .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Automated Testing]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Test Tools
    with internationalization support include:]{.text-T30}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[WinRunner]{.text-T31}[
        -- for Windows user interface testing]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[LoadRunner]{.text-T31}[
        -- for Window heavy load/stress
        testing]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[SILK]{.text-T31}[
        -- for user interface testing]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   []{.text-T32}

</div>

:::

1.  L10n Organization Testing

<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}An external
    localization organization will perform a significant amount of your
    testing[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Managing the
    Localization organization and their testing efforts improves the
    final quality of your localized product[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}

::: {#Selecting_a_Localization_Organization .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.568cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Selecting a Localization Organization

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}A qualified
    localization organization has the following
    capabilities:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Substantial
        localization experience in the target language[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Experience
        in the end-user market of your product[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Experience
        in localization testing[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}References
        available []{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Localization_Deliverables .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Localization Deliverables

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}An agreement
    with a localization organization should document:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Ownership
        of glossary translation]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Schedule]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Number
        of words in documentation]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Proposed
        number of hours of Localization Engineer
        time]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        -   []{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Localization_Deliverables .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Localization Deliverables]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Costs
        (Cost/word for documentation, cost/hour for Localization
        Engineer)]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Ownership
        of translation]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Ownership
        of Translation Memory]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Product
        Training to be given to localization
        organization]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Client
        approval of test plans]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Test
        Results documented in a report]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        -   []{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Final_Localization_Deliverables .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Final Localization Deliverables]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Ownership
        of Localization test cases]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Format
        of localization delivery to client]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Point
        of contact in development organization for questions from
        localization organization]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Glossary .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Glossary]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[A glossary
    of terms was mentioned in the list of localization
    deliverables]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[A glossary
    contains all of the unique terms used by your software product that
    will need translation]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Glossary .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Glossary]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The
    original language glossary is shipped to the localization
    organization for translation]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[This
    translated glossary is used by multiple translators to maintain
    consistency throughout the documentation]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Even_More_Glossary .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Even More Glossary]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Glossary
    terms are translated once, saving money]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Make sure
    your company owns the translated glossary]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[This gives
    you flexibility in the selection of the localization organization
    for the next release]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Translation_Memory_Tools .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Translation Memory Tools]{.text-T8}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Localization
    organizations will use tools called Translation Memory
    tools]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Translation
    Memory tools use previous translations to leverage new
    translations]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P17 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Translation_Memory_Tools .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}

1.  [More Translation Memory Tools]{.text-T8}

</div>

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[For
    example, if you translate the phrase]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  ["]{.text-T8}[A is good."]{.text-T8}

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Then
    translate the phrase ]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  ["]{.text-T8}[B is good."]{.text-T8}

-   []{.text-T8}

</div>
